description: GitHub Copilot OpenTelemetry telemetry in Azure Application Insights, across ALL surfaces (VS Code + Copilot CLI). Copilot spans land in the App Insights 'dependencies' table with cloud_RoleName = the surface and gen_ai.* values in customDimensions. Use the 'Copilot surface' selector and set the Application Insights resource ID on import.

list.name: surface
list.label: Copilot surface
list.query: All surfaces : copilot-chat|github-copilot, VS Code (copilot-chat) : copilot-chat, Copilot CLI (github-copilot) : github-copilot

azureLogAnalytics.query: dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend op=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where op == 'chat' | summarize Total=count()
dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend cr=toint(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens']) | where cr > 0 | summarize Hits=count()
dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend cc=toint(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.cache_creation.input_tokens']) | where cc > 0 | summarize Misses=count()
dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend op=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where op == 'execute_tool' | summarize Tools=count()

panels.title: LLM Calls by Surface
panels.description: chat dependencies split by cloud_RoleName — copilot-chat (VS Code) vs github-copilot (CLI).

azureLogAnalytics.query: dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend op=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']) | where op == 'chat' | summarize Calls=count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), cloud_RoleName | order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Cache Hit vs Miss Over Time
panels.description: Hits = cache reads, Misses = cache creations.

azureLogAnalytics.query: dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend cr=toint(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens']), cc=toint(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.cache_creation.input_tokens']) | summarize Hits=countif(cr > 0), Misses=countif(cc > 0) by bin(timestamp, 5m) | order by timestamp asc

dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend op=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.request.model']) | where op == 'chat' | summarize Calls=count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), model | order by timestamp asc

dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend op=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.request.model']) | where op == 'chat' | summarize p50_ms=percentile(duration, 50) by bin(timestamp, 5m), model | order by timestamp asc

dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend op=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']), tool=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.tool.name']) | where op == 'execute_tool' | summarize Calls=count() by bin(timestamp, 5m), tool | order by timestamp asc

dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend op=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']), inTok=toint(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.input_tokens']), outTok=toint(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.output_tokens']) | where op == 'chat' | summarize InputTokens=sum(inTok), OutputTokens=sum(outTok) by bin(timestamp, 5m) | order by timestamp asc

panels.title: Recent LLM Calls (with surface & cache info)

azureLogAnalytics.query: dependencies | where cloud_RoleName matches regex '$surface' | extend op=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name']), model=tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.request.model']), cacheRead=toint(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.cache_read.input_tokens']), cacheCreation=toint(customDimensions['gen_ai.usage.cache_creation.input_tokens']) | where op == 'chat' | project timestamp, surface=cloud_RoleName, model, cacheRead, cacheCreation, duration_ms=duration | top 50 by timestamp desc

options.content:
## Setup

1. Import this dashboard into Grafana with an **Azure Monitor** data source that can read your Application Insights resource (Monitoring Reader).
2. Set the **Application Insights resource ID** variable, e.g. `/subscriptions/<sub>/resourceGroups/rg-ghcp-otel/providers/microsoft.insights/components/ghcpotel-appi` (get it with `az monitor app-insights component show -g <rg> -a <name> --query id -o tsv`).
3. Pick a **Copilot surface**.

## GitHub Copilot surfaces

| Surface | `cloud_RoleName` |
|---------|------------------|
| VS Code Copilot Chat | `copilot-chat` |
| GitHub Copilot CLI | `github-copilot` |

Copilot spans land in the **`dependencies`** table; `gen_ai.*` values are in `customDimensions`. The **Copilot surface** selector maps to a regex on `cloud_RoleName` (*All* = `copilot-chat|github-copilot`).

## KQL check (Logs)

```kusto
dependencies
| where timestamp > ago(1h)
| where cloud_RoleName matches regex 'copilot-chat|github-copilot'
| summarize count() by cloud_RoleName, tostring(customDimensions['gen_ai.operation.name'])
```

The official Azure **GitHub Copilot** gallery dashboard covers only `copilot-chat`; this dashboard adds the **CLI** (`github-copilot`) via the surface selector.

title: GitHub Copilot OTel — All Surfaces (Application Insights / KQL)
